memberdef.name: GNTST_no_device_space
memberdef.initializer: (-7) /* Out of space in I/O MMU */

memberdef.name: GNTST_bad_page
memberdef.initializer: (-9) /* Specified page was invalid for op */

memberdef.name: GNTTABOP_error_msgs
memberdef.initializer: { \ "okay", \ "undefined error", \ "unrecognised domain id", \ "invalid grant reference", \ "invalid mapping handle", \ "invalid virtual address", \ "invalid device address", \ "no spare translation slot in the I/O MMU", \ "permission denied", \ "bad page", \ "copy arguments cross page boundary", \ "page address size too large", \ "operation not done; try again" \ }
